purpose: Place the Indian story in global context — compare policies, metrics, or outcomes across countries to reveal what is unique or universal.
writingRules: Always specify the year and source of comparison data
Adjust for purchasing power and population when comparing economic data
Explain why the comparison is relevant — what can India learn?
Include both similar and dissimilar countries for context
Avoid 'India vs Pakistan' framing unless explicitly relevant
seoRules: Use table schema for comparison data
Country names should use schema.org Country markup
Ranking data eligible for listicle featured snippets
